title: ASTU B.Tech, M.Sc, B.Sc Results 2026 - Declared

detail.title: ASTU B.Tech, M.Sc, B.Sc Results 2026 - Declared
detail.short_info: ASTU Result 2026 released for B.Tech, M.Sc and B.Sc courses. Check Assam Science and Technology University semester exam results and download marksheet at astu.ac.in.

sections.heading: ASTU B.Tech, M.Sc, B.Sc Results 2026 - Declared

content.text: Assam Science and Technology University has officially declared the B.Tech 5th Semester, M.Sc 2nd and 4th Semester, B.Sc 2nd and 4th Semester Results 2026 on 16-03-2026. The results belong to the 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Assam Science and Technology University exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Assam Science and Technology University website at astu.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Assam Science and Technology University has published the latest B.Tech, M.Sc, and B.Sc semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

rows: B.Tech 5th Semester, M.Sc 2nd and 4th Semester, B.Sc 2nd and 4th Semester

content.text: The university has activated the direct link for checking B.Tech, M.Sc, B.Sc results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check ASTU Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Assam Science and Technology University has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Assam Science and Technology University exam portal at astu.ac.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose B.Tech, M.Sc, or B.Sc from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your Assam Science and Technology University result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
